data.title: Add Homebrew dependency detection and Node 20.x PATH injection to create-dso-app.sh
data.description:
testing_mode: RED

Extend plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh (created by 8356-7324) with Homebrew dependency detection and Node PATH injection.

Requirements from story done definition:
- Check Homebrew first: if absent, print installation instructions and exit non-zero
- For each required dep (bash 4+, git, GNU coreutils, Node 20.x, pre-commit, Claude Code), check presence and install via brew; for any that cannot be auto-installed, print 'Run: brew install <package>' and exit non-zero with 'Prerequisites not met — re-run after installing the above.'
  - brew install node@20 (keg-only — NOT on default PATH after install)
  - brew install --cask claude-code
- Node 20.x PATH injection: export PATH="$(brew --prefix node@20)/bin:$PATH" immediately after installation
- PATH injection BEFORE exec < /dev/tty call (so modified PATH propagates to claude child process)
- All tests in tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app.sh covering S4 behavior must pass GREEN after this task

Acceptance Criteria:
- Verify: grep -q 'brew --prefix node' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: grep -q 'export PATH' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: grep -q 'Prerequisites not met' plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
